occurrence_sentence: EPB and Oak Ridge National Laboratory announce plans for research collaborative focused on energy resilience and quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: announced the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science
occurrence_sentence: EPB and Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) announced the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science.

interaction_phrase: have collaborated on nearly 30 funded projects
occurrence_sentence: To date, EPB and ORNL have collaborated on nearly 30 funded projects.

interaction_phrase: announced the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science
occurrence_sentence: EPB and Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) announced the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science.
To date, EPB and ORNL have collaborated on nearly 30 funded projects.

Building on $180 million in joint energy-related research, EPB and Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) marked 10 years of collaboration with the announcement of the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science (CERQS).

Building on $180 million in joint energy-related research, EPB and Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) marked 10 years of collaboration with the announcement of the new Collaborative for Energy Resilience and Quantum Science (CERQS).

U.S. Representative Chuck Fleischmann (TN-03), Chairman of the House Appropriations Subcommittee on Energy and Water Development, who represents both Chattanooga and Oak Ridge, joined EPB in hosting Dr. Stephen K. Streiffer, who was appointed as director of ORNL in October 2023, for his first tour of EPB's facilities as they all came together in announcing the new cooperative effort.

Today's major announcement that EPB and ORNL are increasing their partnership to strengthen Chattanooga's existing first-ever commercially available quantum network, the only in the world, is yet another significant milestone that will change how business and research is done.
To date, EPB and ORNL have collaborated on nearly 30 funded projects.

Today's major announcement that EPB and ORNL are increasing their partnership to strengthen Chattanooga's existing first-ever commercially available quantum network, the only in the world, is yet another significant milestone that will change how business and research is done.
To date, EPB and ORNL have collaborated on nearly 30 funded projects.

interaction_phrase: bringing together our respective research capabilities
occurrence_sentence: "There's tremendous potential for ORNL to build on our work with EPB," Streiffer said. "By bringing together our respective research capabilities and cutting-edge deployment, we can substantially advance research and move it toward practical application and commercialization."

interaction_phrase: partnered to demonstrate quantum cryptographic technologies
occurrence_sentence: Quantum cybersecurity technology has been one of the most prominent focus areas for the joint effort. With Department of Energy funding aimed at securing America's electric grid against cyberthreats, EPB, ORNL, Los Alamos National Laboratory (LANL), and Qubitekk, Inc., partnered to demonstrate quantum cryptographic technologies across a fiber optic network that EPB established between some of its electric substations.

interaction_phrase: build on our work with EPB
occurrence_sentence: "There's tremendous potential for ORNL to build on our work with EPB," Streiffer said.

interaction_phrase: join forces and advance quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: Because both the public and private sector are investing billions to unlock the groundbreaking potential of this emerging industry, there are tremendous new opportunities for EPB and ORNL to join forces and advance quantum technology for deployment that transforms energy system resilience, reliability and security for customers.
To structure the effort, ORNL and EPB will establish CERQS to focus on four strategic goals:

Because both the public and private sector are investing billions to unlock the groundbreaking potential of this emerging industry, there are tremendous new opportunities for EPB and ORNL to join forces and advance quantum technology for deployment that transforms energy system resilience, reliability and security for customers.
To structure the effort, ORNL and EPB will establish CERQS to focus on four strategic goals:
"We look forward to working with EPB and ORNL as we strive to keep our city on the cutting edge for generations."
"I'm excited that in Hamilton County, students of all ages and backgrounds have opportunities to learn and grow in a place where the biggest ideas are pursued from EPB to ORNL."
